hero.subtext: Lumina Whisper is a Mac app for high-accuracy voice input. Powered by OpenAI Whisper, it delivers fast and precise transcription entirely on-device.

pain.question: Frustrated with voice input on Mac?
pain.answer: Lumina Whisper solves all of that.

hotkey.title: One Hotkey
hotkey.desc: Press Fn anytime to start voice input. Text is inserted directly into the active window.

local.title: Fully Local
local.desc: Your audio never leaves the device. No internet required, full privacy.

silicon.title: Apple Silicon Optimized
silicon.desc: Blazing fast and power-efficient recognition powered by the Neural Engine.

llm.title: LLM Post-Processing
llm.desc: Automatically removes filler words ("um", "uh") and applies custom formatting instructions — all locally.

multilingual.title: 13 Languages
multilingual.desc: Supports 13 languages including Japanese, English, Chinese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, and Italian.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.text: Place the cursor where you want to type

step4.label: Step 4
step4.text: Press Fn to stop → text is inserted

demo.label: How it works
demo.title: Voice input, in any app
demo.desc: Text is inserted directly at the cursor position in any app. No clipboard needed — one key press does it all.
demo.step1: Place the cursor where you want to type
demo.step3: Press Fn again → text is inserted
phrases: Add TypeScript types for the API

stats.label: Why Lumina Whisper
stats.languagesSub: JA · EN · ZH · KO · FR · DE & more

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.title: Voice becomes text, in any situation
useCases.tab1Title: Dictate code comments and commit messages
useCases.tab1Desc: Press Fn while your editor is focused and just describe what you're doing. Faster than typing and keeps you in the flow.
useCases.tab2Title: Transcribe meeting notes in real time
useCases.tab2Desc: Dictate into your note app while the meeting is happening. Fully local means confidential discussions stay private.
useCases.tab3Title: Draft replies by voice, polished by LLM
useCases.tab3Desc: Speak naturally and the LLM post-processor removes filler words. Clean, natural output without "um" or "uh".

mockNotion.title: 📋 Weekly Meeting
mockNotion.item1: Complete the landing page revisions by next week.
mockNotion.item2: Also need to review the Analytics setup

mockSlack.message: About the meeting — would Monday next week at 2pm work for you?
mockSlack.typing: Please let me know if that works

mockCode.comment: Pass audio data to Whisper model and run transcription

features.onboardingWizard: First-launch setup wizard — guided flow for granting Accessibility and Microphone permissions and configuring your hotkey
features.warmupOverlay: Model warmup screen — displays progress while the model initializes on first use and safely blocks recording until ready
features.accessibilityLanguageStep: Accessibility permission and language selection added to onboarding — complete permission grant and language choice within the setup wizard
features.defaultFnHotkey: Default hotkey unified to Fn — new installations now default to the Fn key
features.multilingualSupport: Expanded recognition language support to 13 languages — added Chinese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, and Italian alongside Japanese and English

fixes.micPermissionOnLaunch: Microphone permission is now requested at launch — fixes the issue where the permission dialog appeared during the first recording
fixes.silenceDetection: Introduced RMS-based silence detection — prevents hallucination text from being inserted during silent segments
fixes.pasteDelay: Increased paste delay for text insertion (50ms → 200ms) — fixes occasional missed insertions
fixes.modelInit: Model settings are now saved after download — fixes transcription engine failing to initialize on first launch
fixes.onboardingHitTest: Fixed hit testing for language selection options — added contentShape so touch targets are correctly sized

features.hotkeyInput: One-key voice input with Fn — text inserted directly into the active window
features.whisperkitEngine: WhisperKit-powered transcription engine — fast, accurate recognition using Apple Neural Engine
features.textInsertion: Direct text insertion with clipboard fallback — paste manually with ⌘V if auto-insertion fails
features.modelSelection: Model selection (tiny / base / small / medium) and language setting (auto / ja / en)
features.llmPostProcessing: Local LLM post-processing — automatic filler removal with custom and per-app instructions
features.replacements: Text replacement rules — automatically apply custom substitutions to transcribed text
features.dictionary: Word dictionary — register proper nouns to improve Whisper recognition accuracy
features.history: Transcription history — browse and reuse past results

install.title: Installation
install.installStep2: Drag the LuminaWhisper icon to the Applications folder.
install.installStep3: Launch LuminaWhisper from the Applications folder.
install.micDesc1: A dialog requesting microphone access will appear on first launch. Click OK.
install.micDesc2: To change the permission later, go to System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone and enable LuminaWhisper.
install.requirementsValue: macOS 14.0 (Sonoma) or later · Apple Silicon (M1 or later)

setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.menubarDesc: After launching the app, the LuminaWhisper icon appears in the menu bar. Click it to open Settings.
setup.modelDesc: On first launch, the small model downloads automatically. You can switch to tiny, base, or medium in the General tab of Settings. Voice input is available even while a model is downloading.

usage.title: Basic Usage
usage.step1Desc: Click where you want to type (a text editor, email body, etc.).
usage.step2Desc: Recording starts. The menu bar icon blinks to indicate recording.
usage.step3Desc: Speak clearly. Punctuation is inserted automatically.
usage.step4Desc: Recording stops. The recognized text is automatically inserted at the cursor position.
usage.tipDesc: Accuracy is highest in quiet environments. Using an external microphone is also recommended.

settings.title: Settings
settings.openDesc: Click the menu bar icon → Settings... to open Settings.

model.name: Model
model.desc: The Whisper model used for transcription. Accuracy improves from tiny → base → small → medium, but processing time increases. Uninstalled models can be downloaded here.

language.name: Recognition Language
language.desc: The language used for speech recognition. Choose from auto (detect) or one of 13 supported languages: Japanese, English, Chinese, Korean, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, and Italian.

hotkey.name: Hotkey
hotkey.desc: The keyboard shortcut to start/stop voice input.

llm.name: LLM Post-Processing
llm.desc: After recognition, a local LLM removes filler words and applies formatting. Custom and app-specific instructions can be configured in the LLM tab.

clipboardFallback.name: Clipboard Fallback
clipboardFallback.desc: When enabled, the transcription result is also copied to the clipboard after each recognition. If auto-insertion fails, you can still paste manually with ⌘V.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: Can I use it on macOS 12 (Monterey) or earlier?
faq.a1: No. LuminaWhisper requires macOS 14 (Sonoma) or later on an Apple Silicon Mac.
faq.a2: Currently, it is exclusive to Apple Silicon (M1 or later). There are no plans to support Intel Macs.
faq.q3: Where is my audio data sent?
faq.a3: Audio data is never sent outside the device. All processing is done locally on your Mac.
faq.a4: Please check that LuminaWhisper is allowed under System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility.
faq.q5: How can I improve recognition accuracy?
faq.a5: Speaking clearly in a quiet environment close to the microphone improves accuracy. Selecting a larger model (medium) in the General tab or enabling LLM Post-Processing is also effective.

troubleshoot.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshoot.issue1Step1: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone
troubleshoot.issue1Step2: Check that the LuminaWhisper toggle is on
troubleshoot.issue2Step1: Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility
troubleshoot.issue2Step2: Add LuminaWhisper to the allowed list (use the + button if not present)
troubleshoot.issue3Step1: Verify you are running macOS 14 or later on Apple Silicon
troubleshoot.issue3Step2: Check that the app is allowed to run under System Settings → Privacy & Security
troubleshoot.issue4Step1: Make sure a text input field has focus before stopping recording
troubleshoot.issue4Step2: Check that accessibility permission has been granted
troubleshoot.issue4Step3: Enable 'Clipboard Fallback' in Settings — if insertion fails, you can still paste manually with ⌘V
troubleshoot.contactDesc: If the issue persists, try uninstalling and reinstalling the app, or reset your settings.
